hook: Body scan meditation can enhance your health in unexpected ways.

script.hook: Did you know that simply paying attention to your body can improve your health?
beats: The insula processes signals from your body, helping you understand how you feel.
Body scan meditation trains this awareness, leading to better emotional regulation and pain management.
However, results can vary, and it may not be suitable for everyone, especially those with trauma histories.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of a brain highlighting the insula area.
Footage of someone practicing body scan meditation.
Graphics showing benefits like improved emotional regulation.
Text overlay with a reminder about individual variations in response.
